<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sáe̤k]][[de:Erde-Hund]][[hak:Vú-sut]][[ja:戊戌]][[ko:무술 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Hund]][[vi:Mậu Tuất]][[za:Fouhswt]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sut]][[zh-yue:戊戌]][[zh:戊戌]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sáe̤k]][[de:Erde-Hund]][[hak:Vú-sut]][[ja:戊戌]][[ko:무술 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Hund]][[vi:Mậu Tuất]][[za:Fouhswt]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sut]][[zh-yue:戊戌]][[zh:戊戌]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sáe̤k]][[de:Erde-Hund]][[hak:Vú-sut]][[ja:戊戌]][[ko:무술 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Hund]][[vi:Mậu Tuất]][[za:Fouhswt]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sut]][[zh-yue:戊戌]][[zh:戊戌]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dog|kanji=戊戌|romaji=tsuchinoe inu|onyomi=bojutsu|p=wùxū|w=wu-hsü|mi=u⁵⁵ ɕy|y=mou6 seot1|j=mou6 seot1|ci=mɐu sœt̚|mc=məu syt|oc-bs=mə ssu|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dog also known as  戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Dog (zodiac)|en|Dog (zodiac)|WD=Q755126|lt=Dog (戌)|1=Dog (zodiac)}} also represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and together they exhibit a relationship of {{ill|Biwa (Mutual Harmony)|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Biwa|lt_ja=比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwa (Mutual Harmony)|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwa (Mutual Harmony)|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: boshu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

<!--
==
* Yang Earth Dog (戊戌) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 zeoi3
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: つちのえいぬ (tsuchinoe-inu)
***Onyomi: ぼかのいぬ (boka-no-inu)
***Onyomi: ぼじゅつ (bojutsu)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): musuk
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

-->
==Years of Yang Earth Dog==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 38 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=Year|1=Year}} of Wuxu.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Wuxu'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 38|en|AD 38|WD=Q23847|lt=38 AD|1=AD 38}}
* {{ill|AD 98|en|AD 98|WD=Q30575|lt=98 AD|1=AD 98}}
* {{ill|158|en|158|WD=Q30929|lt=158 AD|1=158}}
* {{ill|218|en|218|WD=Q30039|lt=218 AD|1=218}}
* {{ill|278|en|278|WD=Q32502|lt=278 AD|1=278}}
* {{ill|338|en|338|WD=Q32415|lt=338 AD|1=338}}
* {{ill|398|en|398|WD=Q48146|lt=398 AD|1=398}}
* {{ill|458|en|458|WD=Q30922|lt=458 AD|1=458}}
* {{ill|518|en|518|WD=Q30183|lt=518 AD|1=518}}
* {{ill|578|en|578|WD=Q32039|lt=578 AD|1=578}}
* {{ill|638|en|638|WD=Q31601|lt=638 AD|1=638}}
* {{ill|698|en|698|WD=Q23491|lt=698 AD|1=698}}
* {{ill|758|en|758|WD=Q30538|lt=758 AD|1=758}}
* {{ill|818|en|818|WD=Q25083|lt=818 AD|1=818}}
* {{ill|878|en|878|WD=Q23910|lt=878 AD|1=878}}
* {{ill|938|en|938|WD=Q24794|lt=938 AD|1=938}}
* {{ill|998|en|998|WD=Q23791|lt=998 AD|1=998}}
|
* {{ill|1058|en|1058|WD=Q19380|lt=1058 AD|1=1058}}
* {{ill|1118|en|1118|WD=Q19539|lt=1118 AD|1=1118}}
* {{ill|1178|en|1178|WD=Q19696|lt=1178 AD|1=1178}}
* {{ill|1238|en|1238|WD=Q5433|lt=1238 AD|1=1238}}
* {{ill|1298|en|1298|WD=Q5563|lt=1298 AD|1=1298}}
* {{ill|1358|en|1358|WD=Q6140|lt=1358 AD|1=1358}}
* {{ill|1418|en|1418|WD=Q6201|lt=1418 AD|1=1418}}
* {{ill|1478|en|1478|WD=Q6617|lt=1478 AD|1=1478}}
* {{ill|1538|en|1538|WD=Q6470|lt=1538 AD|1=1538}}
* {{ill|1598|en|1598|WD=Q6800|lt=1598 AD|1=1598}}
* {{ill|1658|en|1658|WD=Q6991|lt=1658 AD|1=1658}}
* {{ill|1718|en|1718|WD=Q6899|lt=1718 AD|1=1718}}
* {{ill|1778|en|1778|WD=Q7713|lt=1778 AD|1=1778}}
* {{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838 AD|1=1838}}
* {{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898 AD|1=1898}}
* {{ill|1958|en|1958|WD=Q5253|lt=1958 AD|1=1958}}
|
* {{ill|2018|en|2018|WD=Q25291|lt=2018 AD|1=2018}}
* {{ill|2078 AD|ja|2078年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2078|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2078 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2070年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2138 AD|ja|2138年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2138|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2138 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2198 AD|ja|2198年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2198|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2198 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2258 AD|ja|2258年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2258|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2258 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2318 AD|ja|2318年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2318|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2318 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|WD=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2378 AD|ja|2378年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2378|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2378 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2438 AD|ja|2438年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2438|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2438 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2498 AD|ja|2498年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2498|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2498 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=25世紀|1=25th century|WD=Q49839}}
* {{ill|2558 AD|ja|2558年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2558|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2558 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2618 AD|ja|2618年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2618|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2618 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2678 AD|ja|2678年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2678|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2678 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2738 AD|ja|2738年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2738|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2738 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2798 AD|ja|2798年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2798|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2798 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2858 AD|ja|2858年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2858|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2858 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2918 AD|ja|2918年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2918|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2918 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2978 AD|ja|2978年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2978|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2978 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

=== Events ===
* In the 9th year of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} ({{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838 AD|1=1838}}), {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|WD=Q944693|lt=Kōya Nagahide|1=Takano Chōei}} authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}.
* In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ({{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898 AD|1=1898}}), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the {{ill|Hundred Days' Reform|en|Hundred Days' Reform|WD=Q917709|lt=Wuxu Reform|1=Hundred Days' Reform}} and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place.
==Months of Yang Earth Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Dog==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Pêng-chún]]
[[zh-yue:丙寅]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Earth Dog|qq=ja|戊戌|version=84123813|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Bîng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Wasser-Tigeri]]
[[de:Yang Earth Dog]]

[[ja:戊戌]]

[[zh:戊戌]]
[[ko:무술 (간지)]]
[[fr:Chien de terre]]
[[de:Erde-Hund]]
[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]]
[[de:Wasser-Tigreen]]
[[en:Water Tiger]]
[[fr:Tigre de eauboishak]]
[[it:Bing-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:병인]]
[[vi:Bính Dần]]
[[za:Bingceij]]
[[zh:丙寅]]
[[ar:Yang Earth Dog]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Yang Earth Dog-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aardhond (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Muô-sáe̤k]]
[[hak:Vú-sut]]
[[nds:Eer-Hund]]
[[vi:Mậu Tuất]]
[[za:Fouhswt]]
[[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sut]]
[[zh-yue:戊戌]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aardhond (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Muô-sáe̤k]]
[[hak:Vú-sut]]
[[nds:Eer-Hund]]
[[vi:Mậu Tuất]]
[[za:Fouhswt]]
[[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sut]]
[[zh-yue:戊戌]]
{{wikidata link|Q904922}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
